DPA Schedule (PDPL Addendum) and Cross-Border Transfer Memo — Barq Oasis Holdings CJSC (Controller; CR No. CR-50829910-KSA) and Rahal Data Technologies LLC (Processor) — Effective 2026-04-15.
Scope: Personal data under Saudi PDPL includes information identifying a natural person directly or indirectly; issuer onboarding for RGX listing collects authorized signatory name, Iqama No. IQ-44781234-KSA, corporate CR number, business email, and mobile, as declared in the Issuer Onboarding Form v3.1.
Data minimisation: we do not collect biometrics or precise birth dates for issuer onboarding; Iqama values are truncated and salted-hash stored for verification-only matching.
Consent: Ms. Nada Al-Hazmi withdrew marketing consent on 2026-05-02 via privacy@barqoasis.sa; request closed, promotional messages suppressed within 48 hours; regulatory and service notices are unaffected.
DSAR: Mr. Sami Al-Baridi submitted access request DSAR-2026-091 on 2026-05-10; copy of onboarding and KYC records delivered 2026-05-13 with Iqama image redacted and CR document masked; identity verified using a one-time code sent to the registered mobile.
Erasure: recruitment records for Dr. Laila Al-Qashqari (candidate) were deleted on 2026-04-28; issuer records linked to RGX disclosures are retained under legal hold and excluded from deletion pursuant to the Kingdom Securities Rulebook.
Cross-border transfer: approval following an SDAIA-style procedure (KDA-XBT-2026-013) was issued by the Kingdom Data Authority on 2026-05-01 for vendor support only; a single export executed 2026-05-03 to Eqlim Cloud FZE (UAE) included pseudonymised signatory data (hashed Iqama, truncated CR, business email) and excluded any scanned IDs.
MNPI segregation: draft earnings, undisclosed corporate actions, and board agendas for Barq Oasis Holdings CJSC are tagged as MNPI and were not included in any export; no non-public issuer information left KSA environments.
Completed control: the emergency SFTP route referenced in SOP v1.2 was decommissioned on 2025-11-01 and is not available in production.
Retention: issuer KYC data retained 10 years from offboarding; vendor support logs 12 months; marketing preferences 24 months; automated deletion job RET-CR-10Y executed 2026-05-20 (job id RET/BOH/2026/051).
Data export approval validity ended 2026-06-01; as of this memo, no further cross-border transfers are scheduled or in progress.
Security note: non-production testing uses synthetic datasets only; no live PII or MNPI is present in development or UAT systems.
Processor obligations: Rahal Data Technologies LLC shall not appoint sub-processors without written approval; as of 2026-06-05 no sub-processors are engaged.
Contact: Data Protection Officer, Mr. Adil Al-Muammar — dpo@barqoasis.sa, +966-11-287-9044; complaints may be escalated to the Kingdom Data Authority under PDPL.
